title: Iran stops negotiations with U.S., vows to 'completely' block Strait of Hormuz: State media
summary: Iran has halted negotiations with the U.S. and threatened to completely block the Strait of Hormuz, according to state media reports. The escalation comes amid Israeli military operations in Lebanon targeting the Iran-backed Hezbollah militia. This threat is significant as it could disrupt critical global oil supply and shipping routes.
content: The report in Iranian state media homes in on Israel's military operations in Lebanon against the Iran-backed militia Hezbollah.

zh.title: 伊朗停止与美国谈判，誓言"完全"封锁霍尔木兹海峡：国家媒体
zh.summary: 根据国家媒体报道，伊朗已停止与美国的谈判，并威胁要彻底封锁霍尔木兹海峡。这一升级发生在以色列对黎巴嫩进行军事行动、针对伊朗支持的真主党武装之际。这项威胁意义重大，因为它可能会中断全球关键的石油供应和航运路线。

title: UK banks blocked from cyber AI tool Mythos get offer from rival OpenAI
summary: Nine UK banks that were denied access to Anthropic's Mythos cyber AI tool have been offered access to OpenAI's GPT 5.5 Cyber instead. This reflects intense competition between Anthropic and OpenAI for enterprise AI customers in the financial services sector. The move allows OpenAI to gain market share with previously excluded financial institutions.
content: Nine banks have been offered access to GPT 5.5 Cyber, as fierce rival Anthropic has blocked previews of its tool.

zh.title: 被拒使用网络AI工具Mythos的英国银行获得竞争对手OpenAI的报价
zh.summary: 9家被拒绝使用Anthropic的Mythos网络AI工具的英国银行已获得OpenAI提供的GPT 5.5 Cyber的访问权。这反映了Anthropic和OpenAI在金融服务业企业AI客户中的激烈竞争。此举使OpenAI能够赢得之前被排斥的金融机构的市场份额。

title: I’m cutting my 401(k) contribution to 3% for one year to help with moving expenses. Is that risky?
summary: A person in their early 30s is considering reducing their 401(k) contributions to 3% for one year to cover moving expenses. The article examines whether this short-term sacrifice poses risks to long-term retirement savings. The decision highlights the tension between immediate financial needs and decades-long retirement planning.
content: “I’m in my early 30s so I have quite a bit of time to save for retirement.”

zh.title: 我要将401(k)供款减至3%，为期一年以应对搬迁费用。这有风险吗？
zh.summary: 一位30多岁的人正在考虑将其401(k)供款减至3%，为期一年，以支付搬迁费用。该文章审视这一短期牺牲是否对长期退休储蓄构成风险。这一决定凸显了眼前财务需求与数十年退休规划之间的矛盾。

title: The stock market just did something eerily similar to the dot-com bubble top in 2000
summary: Recent stock market performance in May shows concerning parallels to the dot-com bubble peak of 2000, with gains heavily concentrated in AI-adjacent stocks. The narrow breadth of the rally raises questions about market sustainability and investor exuberance. This pattern mirrors the period preceding the tech crash of 2000-2002.
content: Surging stock performance in May was concentrated in the AI adjacent.

zh.title: 股票市场刚刚做了一件与2000年互联网泡沫顶部非常相似的事情
zh.summary: 5月最近的股票市场表现显示与2000年互联网泡沫峰值存在令人担忧的相似之处，涨幅主要集中在与AI相关的股票中。这次上涨的狭窄幅度引发了对市场可持续性和投资者过度乐观的质疑。这种模式镜像了2000-2002年科技崩盘之前的时期。

title: Stargate live updates: OpenAI pushes forward on Michigan data center after slashing spend
summary: OpenAI, Oracle, and Related Digital are moving forward with the Stargate Michigan data center project despite OpenAI significantly reducing overall capital spending plans. The companies are discussing AI infrastructure development, job creation, and community engagement for the facility. The project continues despite financial constraints, signaling sustained commitment to AI infrastructure expansion.
content: OpenAI, Oracle and Related Digital discuss the Stargate Michigan buildout, AI infrastructure, jobs and community plans.

zh.title: Stargate实时更新：OpenAI在大幅削减支出后继续推进密歇根数据中心
zh.summary: OpenAI、Oracle和Related Digital正在继续推进Stargate密歇根数据中心项目，尽管OpenAI大幅削减了整体资本支出计划。这些公司正在讨论该设施的AI基础设施开发、就业创造和社区参与。尽管面临财务限制，该项目仍在继续，表明对AI基础设施扩展的持久承诺。

title: Here are Monday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Broadcom, Microsoft, IBM, Meta, Tyson Foods & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued major ratings and price target updates on multiple companies Monday, including tech giants Nvidia, Apple, and Microsoft alongside other sectors. These analyst calls guide investors on which stocks offer attractive valuations or present risks. The breadth of coverage indicates analysts are reassessing valuations across multiple industries.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Monday.

zh.title: 以下是周一最大的分析师观点：英伟达、苹果、特斯拉、博通、微软、IBM、Meta、泰森食品及更多
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师在周一对包括英伟达、苹果和微软等科技巨头以及其他行业的多家公司发布了主要的评级和目标价格更新。这些分析师观点指导投资者了解哪些股票具有吸引力估值或存在风险。覆盖范围的广泛性表明分析师正在重新评估多个行业的估值。

title: Abusive passengers could be blacklisted from all airlines under new proposal
summary: A new proposal would allow airlines to share information on disruptive passengers and potentially ban them from flying across airline networks. The initiative aims to reduce passenger abuse incidents and improve safety for airline staff and other travelers. The cross-airline coordination represents an escalation in industry efforts to deter aggressive behavior.
content: The scheme would allow airlines to share information on disruptive passengers and potentially restrict their access to flights.

zh.title: 新提议：虐待乘客可能被列入所有航空公司黑名单
zh.summary: 一项新提议将允许航空公司共享关于破坏性乘客的信息，并可能禁止他们在跨航空公司网络上乘坐飞行。该倡议旨在减少乘客辱骂事件，提高航空公司员工和其他乘客的安全。跨航空公司协调代表了业界阻止攻击性行为的升级。

title: Barry Diller's People offers to buy casino giant MGM Resorts for $48.30 per share
summary: Barry Diller's People Inc. has made an acquisition offer for MGM Resorts International at $48.30 per share. The bid represents a major consolidation attempt in the casino and hospitality industry and a significant valuation of one of the world's largest gaming companies. The move could reshape competitive dynamics in the gaming sector.
content: Barry Diller's People Inc. extended an offer for MGM Resorts at $48.30 per share.

zh.title: 巴里·迪勒旗下People公司出价收购赌场巨头美高梅 每股48.30美元
zh.summary: 巴里·迪勒旗下的People Inc.公司对美高梅度假村国际公司的收购出价为每股48.30美元。此出价代表了赌场和酒店业的一次重大并购尝试，也是对全球最大博彩公司之一的重要估值。此举可能会重塑博彩业的竞争格局。

title: A ‘volatility spasm’ is set to provide the toughest test yet to the 9-week-old stock-market rally
summary: Market analysts warn that several catalysts this month could trigger significant volatility and test the durability of the current nine-week stock market rally. Experts cite potential disruptions that may cause market turbulence. The warnings suggest recent gains may face substantial headwinds before establishing a sustainable trend.
content: A bunch of catalysts this month may cause tremors in the market, says SpotGamma

zh.title: "波动痉挛"将成为9周股市反弹最严峻的考验
zh.summary: 市场分析师警告，本月几个催化因素可能引发重大波动，并考验当前持续9周的股市反弹的耐久性。专家指出了可能导致市场波动的潜在干扰。警告表明，在建立可持续趋势前，近期涨幅可能面临重大阻力。

title: Strategy shares fall after selling $2.5 million in bitcoin, its first sale since 2022
summary: Michael Saylor's Strategy Inc. sold $2.5 million worth of bitcoin, marking only the second time the company has ever sold cryptocurrency holdings since its inception. The sale comes as geopolitical uncertainty continues to pressure cryptocurrency prices. The decision signals a potential shift in the company's previously steadfast bitcoin accumulation strategy.
content: Michael Saylor's Strategy sold bitcoin for the second time ever as geopolitical uncertainty continues to weigh on the cryptocurrency's price.

zh.title: Strategy公司出售250万美元比特币后股价下跌，这是自2022年以来首次出售
zh.summary: Michael Saylor的Strategy Inc.出售了价值250万美元的比特币，这是该公司自成立以来第二次出售加密货币资产。此次出售发生在地缘政治不确定性继续对加密货币价格施压的背景下。该决定标志着公司之前坚定的比特币囤积战略可能发生转变。

title: One Wall Street firm is worried a June market reversal may be in the cards. Here's why
summary: A Wall Street firm has warned that a market reversal could occur in June as investors enter a historically weak seasonal period following May's strong performance. The firm cites historical seasonality patterns and current market conditions as reasons for concern. The timing suggests investors may face headwinds beyond immediate catalysts.
content: Investors entering a historically weak period for the market after last month’s strong performance. Their troubles may not stop there.

zh.title: 一家华尔街公司担心6月市场可能出现反转。原因如下
zh.summary: 一家华尔街公司警告称，随着投资者进入5月强劲表现后历史上疲软的季节性时期，6月可能会出现市场反转。该公司引用历史季节性模式和当前市场条件作为担忧的原因。这个时机表明投资者可能面临超越直接催化剂的阻力。

title: Owning a car is a huge expense right now — these 3 tools can help you save
summary: With car ownership costs rising significantly, several financial tools can help drivers reduce expenses including warranties, price comparison shopping, and loan refinancing options. The article provides practical strategies for making vehicle ownership more affordable. These tools address the largest controllable costs associated with car ownership.
content: Car warranties, comparison shopping tools and refinancing can make owning a car more affordable. Here's how to take action.

zh.title: 现在拥有汽车是一笔巨大开支——这3个工具可以帮助你省钱
zh.summary: 随着汽车所有权成本显著上升，包括保修、价格比较购物和贷款再融资选项在内的多种财务工具可以帮助驾驶员降低费用。该文章为降低车辆所有权成本提供了实用策略。这些工具涉及与汽车所有权相关的最大可控成本。

title: ServiceNow, Adobe stocks jump as Nvidia’s new AI chip sparks software rally
summary: ServiceNow and Adobe stock prices surged as Nvidia's new AI chip announcement sparked broader demand for enterprise software platforms implementing AI agents. Enterprise software companies are experiencing renewed investor interest as AI agents drive demand for sophisticated software solutions. The rally suggests AI adoption is creating opportunities across the software industry beyond AI-specific vendors.
content: As AI agents spur demand for more software — not less — major enterprise cloud platforms are staging a comeback.

zh.title: ServiceNow和Adobe股价飙升，英伟达新AI芯片引发软件股大涨
zh.summary: 英伟达新AI芯片发布推动了对企业软件平台的更广泛需求，导致ServiceNow和Adobe股价飙升。AI代理驱动的对复杂软件解决方案的需求使企业软件公司重获投资者关注。这次大涨表明AI采用正在为整个软件行业（而不仅仅是专门的AI供应商）创造机会。

title: Wise under investigation over money laundering control concerns
summary: Fintech company Wise is under investigation by the Brussels prosecutor's office regarding potential money laundering control deficiencies. Wise states that no specific findings have been shared yet, suggesting the investigation is in preliminary stages. The investigation raises compliance questions about the rapidly growing fintech sector.
content: Wise says it is working with the Brussels prosecutor's office but that "no specific findings have been shared with us to date".

zh.title: 支付公司Wise因反洗钱控制问题遭调查
zh.summary: 金融科技公司Wise正在接受布鲁塞尔检察官办公室的调查，涉及可能的反洗钱控制缺陷。Wise表示尚未收到任何具体调查结果，表明调查仍处于初期阶段。这项调查对快速增长的金融科技行业的合规性提出了问题。

title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Monday
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer identified the top ten factors to monitor in Monday's stock market, including Nvidia's push into the PC market and continued gains in software stocks. Cramer's analysis highlights key developments expected to influence market sentiment. The focus on both hardware and software reflects AI's broadening impact across the technology sector.
content: Nvidia is going after the PC market, and the software stock comeback continues.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默周一需要关注的股市十大看点
zh.summary: CNBC的吉姆·克莱默列出了周一股市需要关注的十个因素，包括英伟达进军PC市场和软件股的持续上涨。克莱默的分析强调了预计将影响市场情绪的关键发展。对硬件和软件的关注反映了AI在整个科技行业不断扩大的影响。

title: Goldman Sachs says Japan rally still has legs after record Topix run
summary: Goldman Sachs believes Japanese stocks have room for further growth despite the Topix index reaching record highs this year. The analyst firm sees continued upside potential in the ongoing rally.
content: Japanese stocks still have room to run even after this year's blistering rally, according to Goldman Sachs.

zh.title: 高盛表示日本股市在Topix创纪录后仍有上升空间
zh.summary: 尽管Topix指数今年创下历史新高,高盛相信日本股票仍有进一步增长的空间。该分析师公司看好当前股市反弹的持续上升潜力。

title: Trump hits out at ‘chirping’ critics as Iran peace talks enter new month at impasse
summary: As U.S.-Iran peace negotiations stall into their second month, Trump has criticized opponents on social media. Recent airstrikes between the two countries have intensified tensions and further complicated diplomatic efforts.
content: Trump's Truth Social post comes as air strikes between the U.S. and Iran resumed over the weekend.

zh.title: 特朗普抨击"喋喋不休"的批评者,伊朗和平谈判陷入停滞
zh.summary: 美伊和平谈判进入第二个月陷入僵局,特朗普在社交媒体上批评了反对者。两国之间最近的空袭加剧了紧张局势,进一步复杂化了外交努力。

title: Nvidia-backed $5 billion AI company tells CNBC of major London expansion
summary: Runway, a $5 billion AI company backed by Nvidia, is expanding significantly in London, joining other major AI firms like Anthropic and OpenAI in establishing UK operations. The expansion reflects growing investment in London's artificial intelligence sector.
content: Runway follows U.S. AI giants including Anthropic and OpenAI in announcing big London growth plans.

zh.title: 英伟达支持的50亿美元AI公司向CNBC宣布伦敦重大扩张
zh.summary: 由英伟达支持的50亿美元AI公司Runway正在伦敦大幅扩张,与Anthropic和OpenAI等其他主要AI公司一样在英国建立运营。该扩张反映了伦敦人工智能领域投资的持续增长。

title: Nvidia jumps into PCs with new Arm-based chip debuting in laptops from Microsoft, Dell, HP
summary: Nvidia has entered the PC market with a new Arm-based processor debuting in laptops from Microsoft, Dell, HP, ASUS and others. CEO Jensen Huang unveiled this diversification as a major milestone for the chipmaker.
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang unveiled a long-awaited Arm-based PC chip, breaking into PCs for the first time on new laptops by Dell, Microsoft, HP, ASUS and others.

zh.title: 英伟达推出基于Arm的新芯片进入PC市场，首次应用于微软、戴尔、惠普笔记本
zh.summary: 英伟达通过一款新的基于Arm的处理器进入PC市场，该处理器首次出现在微软、戴尔、惠普、华硕等品牌的笔记本中。CEO詹森·黄将这一多元化举措誉为公司的一个重要里程碑。

title: Nvidia announces new AI chip for personal computers
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang called the company's new AI chip for personal computers the "reinvention of the computer." The announcement represents a significant expansion into consumer computing.
content: The technology giant's boss Jensen Huang called the move the "reinvention of the computer".

zh.title: 英伟达发布个人计算机AI芯片
zh.summary: 英伟达CEO詹森·黄称公司推出的个人计算机AI芯片为"计算机的重新发明"。该公告代表了该公司向消费计算领域的重大扩展。

title: Nvidia picks Unitree for humanoid robot platform as Chinese startup eyes IPO
summary: Nvidia has selected Chinese startup Unitree to provide humanoid robots for its first publicly available robotics system. The partnership comes as Unitree prepares for an initial public offering.
content: The U.S. chipmaker's first publicly available humanoid robotics system will use humanoids from Chinese startup Unitree.

zh.title: 英伟达选择宇树作为人形机器人平台合作伙伴，中国初创企业准备IPO
zh.summary: 英伟达已选择中国初创企业宇树为其首个公开发售的机器人系统提供人形机器人。此次合作之际，宇树正在准备首次公开募股。

title: Home care workers face fuel cost spike fears
summary: A Sheffield-based home care worker has raised concerns about fuel cost increases and argues that caregivers should be compensated for mileage and travel time. The issue highlights wage pressures in the care sector.
content: Home care workers must be paid for their mileage and travel time, a Sheffield-based carer says.

zh.title: 家政护理人员面临燃料成本上升风险
zh.summary: 一名基地在谢菲尔德的家政护理人员对燃料成本上升提出了担忧，并主张护理人员应该获得里程和出行时间的补偿。这个问题突出了护理部门的工资压力。

title: Election 2026: Child poverty a 'huge red flag'
summary: Jersey's children's commissioner has flagged child poverty as a major concern ahead of the 2026 election. Officials view the issue as a critical indicator of community welfare and inequality.
content: The children's commissioner says child poverty in Jersey "is a big red flag" for the community.

zh.title: 2026年选举：儿童贫困是"重大警示"
zh.summary: 泽西的儿童专员在2026年选举前将儿童贫困标记为一个重大问题。官员们将这个问题视为社区福利和不平等的关键指标。

title: Jerome Powell warns that politicizing Fed will erode its credibility
summary: Former Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell has warned that politicizing the Fed threatens its credibility and independence. In a recent speech, Powell described the central bank's autonomy as "a priceless asset" requiring protection.
content: Former Fed Chair Jerome Powell on Sunday called the Federal Reserve’s independence “a priceless asset” that must be protected, in one of his first major speeches since stepping down from his post earlier this month.

zh.title: 杰罗姆·鲍威尔警告称将美联储政治化会削弱其信誉
zh.summary: 美联储前主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔警告称，将美联储政治化会威胁其信誉和独立性。在最近的一次演讲中，鲍威尔将央行的自主权描述为"无价资产"，需要保护。

title: China’s factory activity beats forecasts in May, private survey shows, despite softer official data
summary: China's manufacturing sector expanded faster than expected in May according to private survey data, though growth slowed from April. The outperformance contrasts with softer official economic data.
content: China’s manufacturing activity expanded faster than expected in May, according to a private survey released Monday, although growth slowed from April.

zh.title: 中国5月工厂活动超越预期，私营调查显示，尽管官方数据较疲软
zh.summary: 根据私营调查数据，中国制造业在5月份的扩张速度超出预期，尽管增速从4月份放缓。这种表现强劲与较疲软的官方经济数据形成对比。

title: Oil jumps 2% as Israel expands Lebanon offensive, rattling ceasefire hopes
summary: Israel's expansion of military operations into Lebanon amid renewed Hezbollah clashes drove oil prices up 2% on Monday. The escalation threatens fragile ceasefire negotiations in the region. Geopolitical tensions continue to impact energy markets.
content: Oil prices surged on Monday after Israel instructed troops to push deeper into Lebanon amid renewed clashes with the Iran-backed Hezbollah group.

zh.title: 以色列扩大黎巴嫩军事行动，油价上涨2%，停火希望受挫
zh.summary: 随着以色列在与真主党重新冲突之际扩大对黎巴嫩的军事行动，周一油价上涨了2%。这一升级威胁到该地区脆弱的停火谈判。地缘政治紧张局势继续影响能源市场。

title: Oil rises, U.S. stock futures flat as Wall Street looks to extend its winning streak
summary: U.S. stock-index futures remained largely flat on Sunday as markets aim to extend May's record-setting rally into June. Oil prices continued to climb amid ongoing geopolitical concerns.
content: U.S. stock-index futures were little changed on Sunday, as Wall Street looks to stretch the market’s record-setting rally into June.

zh.title: 油价上涨，美国股指期货持平，华尔街欲延续连涨势头
zh.summary: 周日美国股指期货基本持平，市场力图将5月创纪录的涨势延续到6月。在持续的地缘政治担忧中，油价继续上升。

title: Japanese bond yields are the highest in 40 years. The budget and a 'red flag' from PM Takaichi have markets nervous
summary: Japanese bond yields have reached their highest levels in four decades, creating market unease. Prime Minister Takaichi's recent signals and budget considerations have heightened concerns among investors. The situation reflects broader economic pressures in Japan.
content: Japanese bond yields have reached the highest levels in 40 years. The budget and a 'red flag' from Prime Minister Takaichi have made markets nervous.

zh.title: 日本债券收益率创40年新高，预算和首相高市早苗的"危险信号"令市场紧张
zh.summary: 日本债券收益率已达到四十年来的最高水平，引发市场担忧。首相高市早苗的最近信号和预算考量加剧了投资者的担忧。这一局面反映了日本更广泛的经济压力。

title: Put a £5 deposit on vapes to stop littering, say waste companies
summary: Waste management companies are proposing a £5 refundable deposit system to encourage vape recycling and reduce littering. The industry body believes the deposit model would boost collection rates, though other stakeholders remain skeptical.
content: The industry body for waste companies says a refundable deposit would help boost vape recycling, but others disagree.

zh.title: 对电子烟实施5英镑押金制度以遏制乱扔，废物管理公司建议
zh.summary: 废物管理公司提议实施5英镑可退款押金制度，以促进电子烟回收和减少乱扔。该行业机构认为押金模式将提高回收率，尽管其他利益相关者仍持怀疑态度。

title: South Korea stocks hit fresh high amid mixed regional trade despite Trump's Iran deal caution
summary: South Korean stocks reached record highs on Monday despite mixed performance across Asia-Pacific markets. Investors remain cautious about ongoing U.S.-Iran negotiations and their potential market impact.
content: Asia-Pacific markets traded mixed on Monday as investors monitored lingering uncertainty around U.S.-Iran negotiations.

zh.title: 尽管特朗普对伊朗协议持谨慎态度，韩国股票在地区贸易混合中创新高
zh.summary: 尽管亚太地区市场表现参差不齐，但韩国股票周一创下历史新高。投资者对正在进行的美伊谈判及其潜在市场影响保持谨慎态度。

title: A year of grief and waiting: What remains when a plane falls from the sky
summary: One year after India's Air India crash, families continue grappling with loss and unanswered questions. The article chronicles the ongoing grief of a mother and brother still seeking closure and answers.
content: A year after the Air India crash, a mother still speaks about her dead son in the present tense and a brother waits for answers.

zh.title: 一年的悲伤与等待：当飞机从天空坠落时还剩下什么
zh.summary: 在印度航空公司空难发生一年后，家属们仍在应对失去的痛苦和悬而未决的问题。该文章记述了一位母亲和她的兄长持续的悲伤，他们仍在寻求解脱和答案。

title: Berkshire Hathaway makes $6.8 billion housing bet with Taylor Morrison deal
summary: Berkshire Hathaway acquired Taylor Morrison in a $6.8 billion deal, marking a significant strategic move under new CEO Greg Abel. The acquisition represents one of the conglomerate's first major deals since Abel assumed leadership in early 2026.
content: The acquisition marks one of the first major strategic deals under Warren Buffett's successor Greg Abel, who took over as CEO in the beginning of 2026.

zh.title: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦以68亿美元收购泰勒·莫里森进行房地产投资
zh.summary: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦以68亿美元收购泰勒·莫里森，这是新首席执行官格雷格·阿贝尔领导下的重大战略举措。这是该集团自阿贝尔于2026年初上任以来最大的交易之一。
